job.title: Senior Java / Spring Developer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As a Senior Java / Spring Developer in Avignon, you provide technical leadership on development projects and support the teams in upskilling. You design high-performance and scalable back-end solutions.
mission.1: Concevoir et développer des applications Java Spring Boot
mission.2: Définir les standards techniques et les bonnes pratiques
mission.3: Réaliser les revues de code et accompagner les développeurs
mission.5: Mettre en place les tests automatisés et l'intégration continue
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in développement informatique
profile.2: 5 to 9 years of experience Java Spring
